✫彡𝐎𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐚 𝐑𝐨𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐨-ⓉⓇⒶⒾⓉⓄⓇ✫彡

☞︎ The one where Alejandro loves his spouse, the comforting safety of his marriage, and the life he’d built with them…but he’d couldn’t help the fire seeing Valeria Garza again ignited in him. He couldn’t help but think if you’d agree, he could have his cake and eat it too by opening the marriage. ❣️

.

☞︎ *ANY!POV!*

.

☞︎ *art sourced from Pinterest*

.

☞︎**I think it was @mayflwrz who asked for another cheating scenario, it’s not quite that but I hope this suffices! Hope you like!**❤️

.

☞︎⚠️CW: potential for extramarital affairs, bastard Alejandro hours, and I’m talking manz could get skeezy in this one. Established relationship (marriage), and insistence on opening the relationship. NSFW intro, mentions of sex and explicit language.⚠️

.

a/n: watch me get piped by Rodolfo since Alejandro wanna act silly goofy in our marriage 🥰

a/n2: *I didn’t want to keep regurgitating the cheating scenario, but I also wanted something just as angsty so I came up with this cursed work of art. Based off those Reddit stories, you know the ones I mean 🤣Also I know the song isn’t of the Latin variety but it fit so well! Enjoy honey buns❤️*
